name: ice-crawler
description: Triadic zero-trace repository ingestion engine — Frost telemetry, Glacier ephemeral materialization, Crystal deterministic crystallization, and Residue lock. Produces sealed artifacts for AI analysis with real-time dashboard and AGNT thread submission.
author: James Paul Jackson

schema.title: ICE Crawler Repo Ingestion
schema.description: Ingest a Git repository through the triadic Frost→Glacier→Crystal→Residue pipeline. Produces deterministic sealed artifacts for AI analysis with zero residual trace.

repo_url.description: Git repository URL (GitHub browse URL, .git URL, or local path)

max_files.description: Maximum number of files to crystallize

max_kb.description: Maximum file size in KB for individual file analysis

enable_agentics.description: Enable φ-extremal agentic partitioning for multi-agent workflows

schema.title: ICE Crawler Telemetry Estimate
schema.description: Run Frost-only telemetry to estimate repository head and size without cloning.

repo_url.description: Git repository URL for telemetry scan

schema.title: ICE Crawler Dashboard
schema.description: Launch the real-time ICE Crawler monitoring dashboard UI. Server runs persistently in the background.

port.description: Port for the dashboard web server

schema.title: ICE Crawler Open Dashboard
schema.description: Open the ICE Crawler dashboard in the external system browser.

schema.title: ICE Crawler Submit to AGNT
schema.description: Submit the latest ICE Crawler run results to AGNT to open an analysis thread.

run_id.description: Specific run ID to submit (default: latest run)

integrations.description: Open the dashboard in external browser via open-url-native
